title: IARI – Project Associate-I – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate-I. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IARI official website.

basic_details.job_title: IARI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate-I. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IARI official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (3 years relaxation for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Women)

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Plant Physiology/Botany/ Biotechnology/ Plant Science/ Life Science or equivalent qualification required

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IARI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
